query: I want to create a sales pipeline kanban board with stages: Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Closed Won, Closed Lost. How do I set this up using the fazer.ai extensions?
expected_behavior: Creates board with kanban_boards_create with name and description
Creates steps in order with kanban_steps_create for each stage
Explains the board → steps → tasks hierarchy
Shows position parameter for ordering steps
Notes that this requires a fazer.ai Chatwoot instance

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: Would not know about kanban tools as they are fazer.ai-exclusive extensions

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correct kanban setup with proper board and step creation sequence

query: I need to schedule a follow-up message to a customer in conversation #55 for next Monday at 9am. How do I do this?
expected_behavior: Shows ISO 8601 timestamp for the scheduled time
Explains content parameter for the message body
May mention listing existing scheduled messages to avoid duplicates
Notes that this requires a fazer.ai Chatwoot instance

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: Would not know about scheduled message tools as they are fazer.ai-exclusive

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correct scheduled message creation with proper timestamp format

query: I want to review the audit history for a kanban task to see who moved it and when. How can I track this?
expected_behavior: Uses kanban_audit_events_list or kanban_audit_events_get for the task
Explains that audit events track all task movements and changes
Shows how to filter by task ID
Describes the audit event structure (who, what, when)
Notes that this requires a fazer.ai Chatwoot instance

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: Would not know about kanban audit event tools or their existence

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correct audit event query with proper tool and explanation
